meaning: 乍得湖[非洲中北部](在乍得、尼日尔、尼日利亚、喀麦隆等国接界处);n.[计]孔屑
examples: Reports from Chad suggest that rebel forces are advancing on the capital.
The peasant in Chad sows his millet first, and it is hard to criticize this instinctive priority given to his daily bread.
N'Djamena of Chad is ruined by civil war.
The UN has warned CAR's conflict is linked with fighting in Chad and Sudan.
There are 220, 000 refugees from Darfur living in camps in Chad, and more than 110, 000 internally displaced people.
